items.title: Journeyman QB Taylor Heinicke retires after 7 NFL seasons and some memorable moments with Washington
items.summary: Journeyman quarterback Taylor Heinicke, whose unique path to the NFL helped him become a fan favorite in Washington, has retired from the league.  The 33-year-old Heinicke posted a goodbye message on social media Thursday in which he thanked supporters from his seven NFL seasons.

Other moves announced on Thursday was the release of recently unreturned Safety Nasir Adderley and waiving linebacker John Bullock. Kenny Moore II was a fan […]

items.summary: INDIANAPOLIS – Kenny Moore II’s career will resume elsewhere. One of the longest-tenured and most respected Indianapolis Colts was released on Thursday. items.title: Poll Results: How good do you want the Colts to be this year?
items.summary: The short story is that 177 (71.66%) votes were cast that wanted the Colts to win, even if it meant retaining Ballard and Steichen. That left 70 (28.34%) voters who would seemingly prefer our current leadership to be gone, no matter this year’s results. 247 votes were cast, so the sample size is likely healthy […]

items.title: A capsule look at the Colts’ 8 draft picks
items.summary: INDIANAPOLIS — The Indianapolis Colts injected eight draft picks into their roster, including two projected starters this week. Second-round pick CJ Allen, a linebacker out of Georgia, and third-rounder A.J. Haulcy, an LSU safety, bring immediate impact potential. That’s especially true with Allen, who’ll replaced Zaire Franklin and run the defense from the Mike position. [...]

items.title: No trades for Colts’ Anthony Richardson Sr., Kenny Moore II
items.summary: INDIANAPOLIS — Post-draft, it’s status quo with two prominent Indianapolis Colts. The three-day, seven-round, 257-pick NFL Draft ended Saturday evening without quarterback Anthony Richardson Sr. and cornerback Kenny Moore II being traded. That would have been an ideal time for the Colts to resolve trade requests two players submitted. In Richardson’s instance, no team was [...]
